title: Jacootoys Wooden Bowling Set Skittles Toys with 10 Animal Pins 2 Balls Educational Toy Gift for Kids 2 3 4 5 Years and Up
features: 【Unique Design】：Made of quality wood with non-toxic finishes and brightly colored, smooth-sanded pieces.This fun-filled bowling set includes 10 bowling pins, 2 bowling balls. Each pins has numbers ranging from 1 to 10, so its an other easy way to teach basic numbers using this bowling toy, and also it helps in color recognition

【EASY TO PLAY】: Brush up on your bowling skills with this bowling game. Place pins upright, step back with the ball, take aim, and roll the ball to try and knock down as many pins as you can! How many did you knock down? Whoever knocks over the most pins wins! Also can range from a simple knock a sertain colour down to adding numbers together to see your score. Perfect for the increasing development of a child

【GREAT EDUCATIONAL TOYS】: This wooden skittle set is suitable for kids to learn more bowling knowledge that help the kids develop animals recognition, counting skills, hand-eye coordination, and logical thinking ability. And it is great sport toy, improve kids' interested in sport, they can play together with parents and friends, enhance the interaction and social skills, which is a good game for children

【SUITABLE FOR INDOOR AND OUTDOOR】: Durable set for indoor or outdoor use including living rooms, preschools, kindergartens & anywhere else. It is a great way to encourage your toddler to be active and get some exercise in an indoor or outdoor environment. Great present for birthday，parties or holidays (Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving & New Year). Toddlers and preschoolers will love the challenges and fun this toy provides

【OUR COMMITMENT TO YOU】: Customer satisfaction is our number 1 priority. This skittle toy is made with safe material and approved EN 71 test. We offer you 100% Risk-Free Satisfaction Guarantee to let you buy with confidence. Any unsatisfied purchasing experience regarding any problem, feel free to contact us via email
description: Product Description About Jakootoys Jacootoys is designed with various wooden learning toys. We pay attention to product quality and guaranteed safety, focus on every product detail. We want your shopping experience to be easy and enjoyable. Our toy is a mother's safe choice for children. Jacootoys is a partner for the growth of children. Wooden cone game. Jacootoys Wooden Bowling Set Cone Toy with 10 Animal Pens, 2 Balls, Learning Toy for Children 2 3 4 5 Years and Older Excellent bowling learning toy to promote active physical play and number recognition. Great gift idea for babies, infants, boys, girls, preschool children, toddlers, children, preschool children. This pet bowling set is particularly helpful for eye/hand coordination, fine finger and gross motor skills. Children can also gain self-esteem as they learn to flip the pens, and they can play in the team to improve their communication skills, social skills and life skills. High-quality and durable bowling set. Durable child-safe paint and solid wooden construction will keep your child love for years to come. The cones have enough weight to stand well. Little ones could string them together, carry them around and let them roll up on them. Children cheer and giggle! Package size: 16.6 x 16.6 x 15.2 cm. Weight: over 860 g. Suitable for 3 years plus Suitable for indoor and outdoor use. 10 pens (4.72 inches) and 2 bowling balls (1.97 inches in diameter), perfect size for younger children to play. The wooden cones for children are made of wood, so they are safe for children and furniture, but heavy enough to knock when bowling. A free box is included to store the children's toys and also easy to carry for outdoor play. Here is a great reinterpretation of the children's bowling game that makes it perfect for small children. The bright, multi-coloured designs on the pens help attract younger children's attention and improve the ability to count numbers and colour recognition. It helps to promote children's motor skills, balance and hand-eye coordination. And it is a great sports toy that increases children's sports interest. Play while learning and bring your child a new fun and educational game into life! Have fun with this bowling set toy. These attractively decorated wooden cones have beautiful animal faces with bodies 1 to 10. The 10 cones are accompanied by two wooden bowling balls. And in addition, each cone is available in different colours, so that colour recognition is also easier! The game is suitable for indoor or outdoor use. Learn through play. The numbers on the cones are useful for children to learn numbers when setting up and learn extra numbers when counting. They can also be used for other number games for small children. The game also teaches children hand-eye coordination and expands their imagination and creativity. Perfect gift for your beautiful children. Fun and great for motor skills! You and your kids will love this fun bowling play set. Perfect gift for birthdays and Christmas stockings as well as an Easter nest filler. Parents can also use these as a party favor at parties. Delete number decoration. There are 10 cones in total with different numbers (from 1 to 10). Very bright dyed, so good for learning colours, and they are also numbered, so they teach them to count and recognise the numbers. Delightful animal decoration. The bright and cute cartoon animal face decorated on the pens helps to attract the attention of younger children. You will have great interest in the bowling game. Help your child recognise these beautiful animals, or teach them to draw the animals. Smooth ball. The edges of the ball are smooth without burrs, it does not hurt children's hands when playing. And the diameter is 1.97 inches. Children can easily row the balls and knock against the cones.
